name: Forte
description:
Honorable knight of selphia

A bot I actually made on CharAi. Based off of rune factory 4's Forte.

Ill be honest, shes still my favorite character from that game, today.

As per usual, leave your thoughts or suggestions below. If you want more rf bots, tell me, and I might make more.
